title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・収まらねえ熱

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... What a race! I've never paid much
attention to Inari One before, but I can't believe
how powerful she is!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Isn't she from outside the city, like Oguri? Is
everyone out there this amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
That was a good start, Inari One! Just keep it up
and continue making a name for yourself! ...I
know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text: Woo! That's our Inari! You're the pride of Oi!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Really... She's incredible! And to think she used to
be such a tiny li'l thing! How she's grown!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Wow, she's so cool... Inari's shinin' bright as a star!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Looks like I'll needa break out the good stuff tonight.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: YES! It feels like my trainin's paid off!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hang on. If Inari One can run this good, why'd she
slip under the radar last year?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Well, a quick search says she mostly ran G1s in
Oi... And, hmm... It looks like she won the Tokyo
Daishoten too.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I had no idea! Guess she decided to run
regional races first to get a few victories under
her belt. You know, since they're easier to win.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(My fireworks have barely got their attention...
I'm not even close to bright enough.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I gotta do more! I gotta prove the centrals are no
better than the regionals!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...It's too early to get excited. My race to the
top—to become Umamusume of the Year—has
just started!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes on me 'n' I'll prove it to ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I reunite with Inari One after her amazing
victory, I notice a hard look on her face, one I've
never seen before.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss... What race should I run in next?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss... What race should I run in next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After today's performance, her next challenge
seems obvious. It has to be the final big race of
the first half of the year.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So we're gonna bring the heat to a
medium-distance race, huh? Fine by me! It'll be
just like today. I'm gonna—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: No... I'm gonna do even better than I did today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from how well she did here, I'm confident
she'll be able to run well at the Takarazuka Kinen
too, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't help but feel like something's off.
